case_title: CHOW, HENRY C. VS YAO LIN HE

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-02-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YAO LIN HE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHOW, HENRY C. AS TO DEFENDANT YAO LIN HE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-2007, OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, HENRY C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAO LIN HE $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,385.00, PLTF AWARDED THE FOLLOWING DAMAGES, $3200.00 FOR VEHICLE, $600.00 FOR RENTAL FEES & $500.00 FOR STORAGE. COURT FINDS PLTF FAILED TO EFFECTIVELY MITIGATE HIS DAMAGES. FINDING IS REFLECTED IN THE AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN. R. SILVERMAN, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 506).
